Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Apr-16-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Off calendar. The Le declaration fails to show that the parties met and conferred "in person, by telephone, or by video conference" in compliance with CCP 439. Plaintiff's counsel is ordered to comply with the code.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)

HONG T. LE, Esq, Deputy City Attorney (415) 554-3958 hong.le@sfcityatty.org Attorney for Defendant CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

Judge Pro Tem Disclosure provided to parties present at the start of today's hearing. There is no objection to the disclosure. Counsel for defendant does not stipulate to Judge Pro Tem Peter Catalanotti. The parties represented that they had come to an agreement on the discovery responses.

Hearing is held. Discussed, not argued.

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Responses To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, And Requests For Production Of Documents is continued to April 17, 2024 at 9:00 a.m. Dept. 302 Discovery.
